summary: Iteration 51 - Parcel Verification Feature Testing. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). New endpoints GET /api/field-agent/parcels-to-verify and PUT /api/field-agent/parcels/{id}/verify work correctly. Existing dashboard endpoints (field-agent, cooperative, admin) remain functional.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/field-agent/parcels-to-verify correctly filters by assigned farmers and zone
Default filter returns pending/needs_correction parcels only
status_filter=all returns all parcels (verified + pending + rejected)
Invalid status returns 400, invalid parcel ID returns 400, non-existent parcel returns 404
Verification updates are persisted and visible in cooperative parcels/all endpoint
All existing dashboard endpoints (field-agent, cooperative, admin) continue to work

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed, 2 skipped due to rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data. KINDA YABRE parcel (id=69bdf55d5e4f583eff6bd0d6) set to verified status during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Parcel verification feature fully tested. Current state: 3 parcels total - 1 verified (KINDA YABRE), 2 pending (Koffi). Stats endpoint returns correct counts. Mobile screens (ParcelVerifyListScreen.js, ParcelVerifyFormScreen.js) were not tested as this was backend-only testing.
